name: Toffee Popcorn Crunch
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 275°F.
2. Grease a large roasting pan or two 13x9x2-inch baking pans.
3. Place popcorn and almonds in the prepared pan.
4. In a heavy medium saucepan, combine toffee bits and corn syrup.
5. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the toffee is melted (about 12 minutes).
6. Pour the melted mixture over the popcorn and almond combination; stir until evenly coated.
7. Transfer the mixture to the prepared pans.
8. Bake for 30 minutes, stirring frequently.
9. Remove from the oven and stir every 2 minutes until slightly cooled.
10. Allow to cool completely before storing in a tightly covered container in a cool, dry place.
About 1-1/2 pounds of popcorn.
NOTE: For best results, do not double this recipe.
